language.title: Language
language.aiNote: Vulcano and your new plans will use this language. Already-generated plans keep theirs.
language.saveErrorBody: Your language changed on this phone but wasn't saved to your account. Check your connection.

account.title: Account

avatar.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Enable it in your phone settings.

account.emailSentNotice: We sent a confirmation link to both emails. The change applies once you confirm both.

errors.emailInUse: That email is already in use.
errors.passwordShort: Password too short. Use at least 8 characters.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a moment.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.warningBody:
Everything is permanently deleted: your profile, workout and meal plans, chat history with Vulcano, body records, streak, and profile photo.

If you have an active subscription, it's canceled right now (no refund for the current period).
deleteAccount.error: Couldn't delete your account. Try again or contact support.

training.title: My training
training.secondaryNotesPlaceholder: Anything Vulcano should know about your secondary disciplines? (optional)
training.noBodyDataBody: Log your weight at least once (Progress tab) before setting a target weight.
training.wrongDirectionGoalTitle: Your target and your goal don't match
training.wrongDirectionGoalBody: The target weight you set goes against your current goal's direction.
training.unsafeGoalRateBody: That target implies a rate of {{rate}}kg per week — more than what's recommended ({{maxRate}}kg/week max). Adjust your target weight or timeframe.
training.saveHint: Changes apply to your next generated plan.
training.invalidNumbersBody: Height and age must be numbers.
training.savedBody: Changes apply to your next generated plan.

foodPreferences.title: Allergies & dislikes
foodPreferences.subtitle: Used to generate and adjust your meal plans — anything on your allergy list is never suggested.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.systemOffNotice: If notifications are off at the system level, enable them in your phone settings.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.freeNotice: Free plan: 1 workout plan a month, 20 messages a day with Vulcano.
subscription.manageNotice: Change plans, update your payment method, or cancel from Stripe's secure portal.

health.injuriesButtonSubtitle: Adjusts your training plan to your physical limitations
health.conditionsButtonSubtitle: Allergies, dislikes, and medical conditions that affect your diet
